programme.desc: S1 , E298 : Samar, a wealthy tycoon, and Swanandi, a young middle-class professional, enter a marriage of convenience. However, their contractual nuptials gradually evolve into a profound connection.

programme.title: Tula Japnar Aahe
programme.desc: S1 , E434 : After Ambika's tragic death, her husband Atharva and daughter Veda are heartbroken. However, her spirit returns to watch over and protect Veda in unseen yet powerful ways.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E560 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.title: Joy Baba Lokenath
programme.desc: S1 , E57 : Lokenath Brahmachari, also known as Baba Lokenath, was a Hindu saint and mystic who lived in Bengal in the 18th and 19th centuries and worked towards the betterment of society.

programme.title: Joy Baba Lokenath
programme.desc: S1 , E58 : Lokenath Brahmachari, also known as Baba Lokenath, was a Hindu saint and mystic who lived in Bengal in the 18th and 19th centuries and worked towards the betterment of society.

programme.title: Joy Baba Lokenath

programme.title: Joy Baba Lokenath
programme.desc: S1 , E60 : Lokenath Brahmachari, also known as Baba Lokenath, was a Hindu saint and mystic who lived in Bengal in the 18th and 19th centuries and worked towards the betterment of society.

programme.title: Debibaran
programme.desc: Satyapriyo fights for justice when his sister is raped. During his fight, he takes on a corrupt village official in a twisted turn of events.

programme.title: Sati Behula
programme.desc: Savitri is a devoted wife who roams about with her differently abled husband and stands by him despite his difficulties.

programme.title: Boumar Banabash
programme.desc: A royal couple faces divine punishment as the wife endures exile while the prince grapples with a mysterious curse that threatens both love and destiny.

programme.title: Rajar Meye Parul
programme.desc: A childless king marries a woodcutter's daughter to gain an heir. However, his wives kill his seven children, leaving only his daughter Parul, who grows up to be a charming young lady.

programme.title: Abhimaan
programme.desc: After disowning his daughter years ago, an elderly businessman now seeks the help of his grandson to mend his relationship with her.

programme.title: Bhalobasi Tomake
programme.desc: With a temper that's always on the verge of boiling over, a young man's life is transformed in an instant when he meets a woman who brings out the best in him.

programme.title: Aamar Boss
programme.desc: Animesh, an owner of a publishing house, struggles to balance his professional and personal life. However, things change, when his elderly mother starts working in his company.

programme.title: Mrigaya: The Hunt
programme.desc: Four Kolkata officers unite for a high-stakes investigation that tests their courage, unearths buried secrets and strains their loyalty to the force and to each other.

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E561 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.
